---
title: "About"
---

:::{.page-intro}
`corelab` la blog ca nhan de viet ve toan, AI, va cac giai thich truc quan bang hinh, do thi, animation.
:::

## Cach site nay duoc to chuc

- Bai viet publish nam trong `posts/`
- Image va animation da render nam trong `assets/`
- Source tao media nhu `manim` va plot nam trong `src/`

## Dinh huong noi dung

Muc tieu la viet gon, ro, va uu tien truc giac. Mỗi bai viet co the la:

- mot ghi chu ly thuyet ngan
- mot bai giai thich khai niem AI
- mot demo nho bang image hoac animation
